hooks.command: jq -r ".tool_input.command" | grep -qE "git[[:space:]]+push([[:space:]]|$).*(--force|--force-with-lease|(^|[[:space:]])-f([[:space:]]|$))" && printf '%s' "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"permissionDecision\":\"deny\",\"permissionDecisionReason\":\"Force-push is reserved for Richard. Finish all prep (commit, rebase, fetch, verify the lease), then STOP and ask him to run the force-push himself; do not run it.\"}}" || true
